role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues as required.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Quercus robur) and forest biome composition.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (width, markings, shoulders) and correctly noted the absence of signs.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used camera generation quality and image artifacts to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region (Europe) and the specific country (Poland) as the most likely candidate, despite the ground truth being Hungary. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence. The failure to identify Hungary is due to the high visual similarity between Central European deciduous forests and the lack of distinguishing regulatory or linguistic markers in the image.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of forest and road match image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of oak/beech and undergrowth match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described road width and lack of markings.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Image quality assessment is consistent with the visual data.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Hungary was not in the candidate pool.
